meta.title: Calculating The Payoff For Attack And Defensive Strategies
meta.description:
So many security controls under the banner of cyber hygiene. Where should we spend our time and money in our OT security program? This video tackles this question with a game theory based metrics.

Adam describes and demonstrates a metric that identifies top TTPs against ICS based on statistical analysis of recent threats and mapping them to the MITRE framework. The metric includes attack trees, modeling, incomplete information dynamic game theory and more. This approach allows defenders to increase the risk assessment precision which allows for more optimum defense plans.

https://s4xevents.com
